title: RUSTINS Quick Drying Satin Black Paint 500ml - Effortless Application for a Smooth, Professional Finish – Perfect for DIYers Seeking Fast Results and Durability on Interior & Exterior Surfaces
features: Rustins Satin Black Paint - Durable, Fast Drying, and Long-Lasting Finish, Perfect for Interior and Exterior Surfaces
High Durability: Rustins Satin Black Paint offers exceptional durability, providing a long-lasting and resilient finish for various surfaces. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use
Fast Drying: This paint dries quickly, allowing for faster project completion. Within a few hours, your surfaces will be touch-dry and ready for the next coat or use

Smooth Satin Finish: Enjoy a smooth, elegant satin finish that enhances the appearance of your surfaces. Perfect for giving a sophisticated look to furniture, doors, and other items. ADD TO BASKET now
description: From the manufacturer Satin Black Paint Produces a smooth satin finish on wood and metal. Suitable for interior and exterior use. Clean brushes in water. Water based & quick drying For wrought iron & wood Available Sizes 250ml 500ml1 litre 2.5 litre About Rustins I n 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products.
